messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Framework: Express, Styling: Tailwind CSS

Original request: create hello world app, where i can modify the text "hello world" colors, through a frontend ui
Clarifications:
- framework: Express
- styling: Tailwind CSS
Previous validation issues:
- total-mismatch: totalSubtasks (9) must equal subtasks length (8)
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Framework: Express, Styling: Tailwind CSS",
  "decompositionStrategy": "Top-down decomposition: initialize project environment, install and configure required tooling (Express + Tailwind), implement server and build pipeline, create frontend UI that exposes controls for modifying the displayed text and its colors, optionally add a simple API for defaults/persistence, then test and document the app.",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "init-project",
      "title": "Initialize project",
      "description": "Create a new npm project, initialize a git repo, and add basic project structure (src/, public/, package.json).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "A git repository and package.json exist in the project root and directories src/ and public/ are present."
    },
    {
      "id": "install-deps",
      "title": "Install dependencies",
      "description": "Install Express and developer/build tools: tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer, and nodemon (dev).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "init-project"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "npm install completes without errors and package.json lists express, tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer, and nodemon as dependencies/devDependencies."
    },
    {
      "id": "configure-tailwind",
      "title": "Configure Tailwind and build scripts",
      "description": "Create tailwind.config.js and postcss.config.js, add Tailwind input CSS and npm scripts to build/watch CSS output into public/styles.css.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "install-deps"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "tailwind.config.js and postcss.config.js exist and an npm script (e.g., build:css) produces public/styles.css with Tailwind output."
    },
    {
      "id": "create-express-server",
      "title": "Create Express server to serve static frontend",
      "description": "Implement server.js (or src/server.js) that serves files from public/ and exposes an /api route namespace for optional settings.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "install-deps"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "node server.js starts without errors and navigating to http://localhost:3000 serves public/index.html; /api/* returns 200 for defined endpoints."
    },
    {
      "id": "build-tailwind-assets",
      "title": "Add Tailwind input CSS and build assets",
      "description": "Create a CSS input file with @tailwind directives, run the build script to generate the final CSS into public/styles.css, and confirm the file is served.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "configure-tailwind",
        "create-express-server"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "public/styles.css exists, contains Tailwind utility classes, and is successfully loaded by the served HTML page."
    },
    {
      "id": "create-frontend-ui",
      "title": "Create frontend UI to modify text and colors",
      "description": "Implement public/index.html and a small public/app.js using Tailwind for styling; include controls (text input, color pickers) that update the displayed \"hello world\" text and its colors in real time.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "build-tailwind-assets"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "The page displays the default 'hello world' text and controls; changing inputs updates the text content and color/ background immediately in the browser."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-api-settings",
      "title": "Optional API for defaults and saving",
      "description": "Add simple in-memory GET /api/settings and POST /api/settings endpoints to serve and accept default text/color values (no DB required).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "create-express-server"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "GET /api/settings returns JSON with defaults and POST /api/settings accepts JSON and returns the saved object (in-memory), verified via curl or browser."
    },
    {
      "id": "test-and-document",
      "title": "Test app and write usage documentation",
      "description": "Start the server, manually test UI interactions and API endpoints, fix issues, and add a README describing how to run, build CSS, and modify the hello world colors via the UI.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "create-frontend-ui",
        "implement-api-settings"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "README contains start/build instructions and screenshots or steps; manual tests confirm the UI updates text and colors and API endpoints behave as documented."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 8
}
